With anti-abortion fanatics eager to turn half of America into (often hectored, fugitive, ensnared) birthing vessels, it's good to see Karma come to Todd Rokita, the Indiana ghoul and A.G. who responded to the distress of a pregnant 10-year-old rape survivor by launching a witch-hunt against the doctor - or "abortion activist acting as a doctor" - who helped her. Now the doctor's lawyer has begun bringing a defamation suit against him, and a law school complaint has charged him with legal misconduct for his "baseless claims," arguing a lawyer for the state "isn't supposed to be a bully."
